zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander de Bradford於1173年出生在英國英格蘭安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Robert de Bradford32歲，母親Mrs Robert de Bradford27歲。他於1203年與Alice在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1244年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander de Bradford于1173年出生在英国英格兰安德 維亞爾紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Robert de Bradford32岁，母亲Mrs Robert de Bradford27岁。他于1203年与Alice在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1244年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places, large and small, called Bradford; in particular the city in Yorkshire, which originally rose to prosperity as a wool town. There are others in Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Greater Manchester, Norfolk, Somerset, Cheshire, Wiltshire and elsewhere. They are all named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + ford ‘ford’.

History: This name was brought independently to North American by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Bradford (1590–1657), born in Austerfield in South Yorkshire, England, the son of a yeoman farmer, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who emigrated to North America on the Mayflower in 1620. He was a signer of the Mayflower Compact and in 1621 he was elected governor of Plymouth colony, being re-elected thirty times. Another William Bradford (1663–1752), printer, came from Barnwell, Leicestershire, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in 1685, subsequently moving to New York, where he set up a printing press and founded a paper mill. His grandson, also called William Bradford (1721–91), was known as ‘the patriot printer’, famous for his Philadelphia newspaper, which among other things denounced the Stamp Act, "which no American can mention without abhorrence".

variants.name: Braford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Brafford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander de Bradford was born in 1173, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Bradford, was 32 and his mother, Mrs Robert de Bradford, was 27. He married Alice in 1203, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1244, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Bradfordが1173年にイギリスイギリストイン アンド ウエアルニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Robert de Bradfordは32歳，母Mrs Robert de Bradfordは27歳であった。1203年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1244年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander de Bradford(이)가 1173년 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Bradford(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Robert de Bradford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland,England: нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания

ru.Newcastle, Northumberland, England, Grea: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander de Bradford родился в 1173 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Bradford было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Robert de Bradford, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice в 1203 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander de Bradford nació en 1173, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Bradford, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs Robert de Bradford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice en 1203, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1244, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
